525f8b17-07b0-4aa5-b421-43902a7785ee.Text: If the character doens't move during their turn, they gain +15% {g|Encyclopedia:Armour}Armour{/g} until the start of their next turn.

6b4b0344-befd-423e-a32e-984eabc3899d.Text: While the character is adjacent to only 1 enemy, they gain +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g} and +10% bonus to {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}.

defc3440-6091-4e78-8a50-223910b6f0a7.Text: On combat start, the character gain an additional turn before everyone else where they deal +15% increased damage. However on their next turn their {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} are both halved and damage is decreased by -20%.

880551a7-8e32-4712-8042-e59a072575fd.Text: The Rogue Trader's {g|Encyclopedia:Reputation}reputation{/g} level grants the character additional {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonuses{/g}: -Drusians: +(reputation level) to all {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance tests{/g} and +(2 × reputation level) to {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLoreImperium}Lore (Imperium){/g}. -Explorators: +(reputation level)% to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} and +(2 × reputation level) to {g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Tech-Use{/g}. -Kasballica Mission: +(reputation level)% to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g} and +(2 × reputation level) to {g|Encyclopedia:SkillCommerce}Commerce{/g}. -Fellowship of the Void: +(reputation level)% to {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g} chance and +(2 × reputation level) to {g|Encyclopedia:SkillCoercion}Coercion{/g}. -The Imperial Navy: +(reputation level)% to {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover efficiency{/g} and +(2 × reputation level) to {g|Encyclopedia:SkillPersuasion}Persuasion{/g}.

4ae1f478-24d9-457c-8fb6-af47ae3c8e06.Text: Allows the character to wield two-handed melee weapons in one hand. However doing so applies a -20 penalty to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g} per two-handed weapon held. If the weapon is carried in an arm with the ogryn grip augment, the weapon does not apply its penalty.\nThis talent can be toggled by by using {g|f:4ea4225aa3d842f78577c30bb566e2d9}Toggle Iron Grip{/g}

71c05439-7ddb-41a2-aa1b-a4cdc9301c64.Text: The character's {g|Encyclopedia:HeavyArmour}heavy armour{/g} does not reduce {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}.

d9384d4d-a8ac-4712-a3eb-d768c6f7a88d.Text: The character no longer suffer penalties from {g|f:97c5ed689bab49b4add7d92d9155119c}Iron Grip{/g} and {g|f:6506de12c9c14e7e82d3e6eb27466757}Walking Arsenal{/g}.

b79cd6bf-6465-485f-aac8-df12a896f917.Text: While the character is fighting with weapons in both hands, the attack from the second hand (depending on which hand they attacked with first in the {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}) does not cost any additional {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}, and twice per round whenever they scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g} with their primary weapon, they immediately make an attack (whichever costs the least {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}) with their secondary weapon against the same enemy.

6ea6e983-a4f9-4fdf-8937-96b29c2c6ffd.Text: Whenever the character kills an enemy, they gain +3 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}.

8df31c46-d610-4f0b-952b-967ebb911687.Text: Twice per round when the character successfully {g|Encyclopedia:Dodge}dodges{/g} they immediately make an attack (whichever costs the least {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}) with their primary ranged weapon against the same enemy.

7aa57d6b-8d67-4e62-9f05-58238fb6ca8e.Text: The character gains +5% {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g} chance and whenever they successfully {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parries{/g} an attack with their primary melee weapon, they immediately make an attack (whichever costs the least {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}) with their primary weapon against the same enemy.

e706b8ea-c0f2-40ae-b958-cbe21ea61b27.Text: Allows the character to wield two-handed ranged weapons in one hand. However doing so applies a -20 penalty to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g} per two-handed weapon held. If the weapon is carried in an arm with the ogryn grip augment, the weapon does not apply its penalty.\nThis talent can be toggled by by using {g|f:21dec3703c9048cfab0823f5216e5732}Toggle Walking Arsenal{/g}

1d4ca421-e219-4582-ba53-f1d91f4ce9f3.Text: The psyker can be placed in a cell adjacent to an enemy during the tactical phase and whenever they deal damage with a Force weapon, they heals {uip|empyicvanguard|79b128d9f8364e56899de64be4fc3d54} wounds.

3cc2b92b-ae73-45bd-a0ff-a31394a2241d.Text: The psyker deals +{uip|immaterialEdge|1ab77d396507484e9009d2fc5e15b344}% more {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical damage{/g} with Force Weapons

69aed4a3-9169-4d6a-afa4-b4cf2f54a9e2.Text: Next psychic ability is applied twice!

69370109-3fc4-4f5d-a332-e237af25810c.Text: Every 5 psychic power is applied twice on the same main target.

fedc110d-9822-4348-8928-f1a9d6081652.Text: The psyker uses their own body as fuel sacrificing {uip|soulfurnace|9ff4b2c9883d41b2aa608a33d67567b8} health to ignore 5 points of deflection and increase damage done by 50% untill the end of the turn. These bonuses apply to Psychic Powers, Force Weapons and Psyker Staves

757fdeac-d6e5-43a1-a7cf-fcb25eb8328e.Text: The psyker have used their own body as fuel to ignore 5 points of deflection and increase damage done by 50% untill the end of their turn. These bonuses apply to Psychic Powers, Force Weapons and Psyker Staves

cce792a3-d9cd-487d-8baf-e47cc2773838.Text: The psyker uses their own body as fuel sacrificing 25% of their max health to ignore 5 points of deflection and increase damage done by 50% untill the end of the turn. These bonuses apply to Psychic Powers, Force Weapons and Psyker Staves

48c9152f-c900-4c36-abcf-e77da48c03f0.Text: The psyker can use {g|Encyclopedia:SkillPersuasion}Persuasion{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SkillCoercion}Coercion{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SkillCommerce}Commerce{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLogic}Logic{/g} based on {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} instead of their normal characteristic.

22d35862-df83-440b-bb39-2df716e37631.Text: The psyker can use {g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Tech-Use{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLoreImperium}Lore (Imperium){/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLoreWarp}Lore (Warp){/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLoreXenos}Lore (Xenos){/g} based on {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} instead of their normal characteristic.

6c1b78d1-c307-4fbd-bd3f-78db3b8847d1.Text: The psyker can use {g|Encyclopedia:SkillPersuasion}Awareness{/g} based on {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} and adds their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} bonus to {g|Encyclopedia:Initiative}Initiative{/g}.

f02837a3-038b-4a19-990a-87bdac6a9f8b.Text: The character gains {uip|Buff|b2dff51420614bd4815964c5b7983e24} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g} and 5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g} but loses {uip|Debuff|b2dff51420614bd4815964c5b7983e24} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g}

cb13f42b-5c72-4724-bec6-46d45eb29ab0.Text: Grants +3% increased damage per stack. At 10 stacks grants an additionaly 2% critical hit chance and 1% critical damage per stack.

9cfed787-6ded-4667-a765-2b97f334d79f.Text: The first time you hit an enemy with a melee attack you gain 1 stack of {g|f:9edb20c82b2d4607b4fd934f04f4d339}Bloodlust{/g} and the first time you kill an enemy in melee you gain 2 stacks of {g|f:9edb20c82b2d4607b4fd934f04f4d339}Bloodlust{/g}. \nFor every 2 stacks of bloodlust, start rounds with +1 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}.

765342ad-5cd8-424d-950c-8784c873a3e0.Text: The character gains {uip|Buff|94bcc20d9d5648959e49b5e74f9551ba} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} and 5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} but loses {uip|Debuff|94bcc20d9d5648959e49b5e74f9551ba} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g}

15d81b8e-2e4e-4915-8add-ea666f49d7f4.Text: The character takes {uip|ReducedDamage|e591b0337f7a49a89e6a0c89e8a82245}% reduced damage from Critical Hits, and increase their wounds by {uip|Wounds|e591b0337f7a49a89e6a0c89e8a82245}.

8e739fab-48c1-49a0-9772-ceba8ab75678.Text: The character gains {uip|Buff|6262f2af2f8848aeb87785be2bf5d8ef} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} and 5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} but loses {uip|Debuff|6262f2af2f8848aeb87785be2bf5d8ef} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g}

62d59785-4696-4fa3-9c59-59a08e57534f.Text: The character gains +20% chance to critical hit, +10% critical hit damage on the next attack.

945c0d01-c7a9-4bd3-a39f-04efcdaf9fff.Text: Whenever the character moves at least 4 cells in a turn, they gain +20% chance to critical hit, +10% critical hit damage on the next attack that hits, and until the end of their turn their critical hits restores 4 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} .

a7dce97c-520c-4e3e-aecf-89a4b7d8705c.Text: The character gains {uip|Buff|0f8720e04a7343bdad0d00f0ce635021} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} and 5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} but loses {uip|Debuff|0f8720e04a7343bdad0d00f0ce635021} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g}

e5697907-6f43-4fbe-87ea-8707cc41070c.Text: When the character starts their turn, they gain random boon from Tzeentch until the start of their next turn.

77ca11c0-8aa1-48f4-857a-96a52cb9359d.Text: The character gains {uip|Buff|78598e83e4f64838bd6f2bc9f174d2b8} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g} but loses {uip|Debuff|78598e83e4f64838bd6f2bc9f174d2b8} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}.

d1c49b98-700e-41bb-a93f-804c6563109e.Text: Gain 15% damage and restore 2 MP on melee kills.

4b653e15-2229-4178-81bb-63cd7ad782b1.Text: Grants +5% critical hit chance and on your first turn all abilities cost 1 less ap.

4b0746f6-6a68-4677-99bc-f842b5f7041f.Text: Upon start of combat, receive a boon from one of the 4 chaos gods for the remainder of the combat.
